title: Nethermind Launches AI-Driven AuditAgent Beta
summary: Nethermind's new AuditAgent beta employs advanced AI to automate smart contract security triaging across EVM and Solana ecosystems.

title: XMTP Protocol Reaches 1M Monthly Active Users Milestone
summary: The XMTP network celebrates a major adoption milestone with over 1 million monthly active users utilizing decentralized messaging across 50+ apps.

title: Keyrock Security Bounty: $150k Payout for Critical Trading Engine Flaw
summary: Keyrock successfully awarded a $150,000 bug bounty to a researcher who identified a critical vulnerability in its proprietary trading algorithms.

title: Monad Labs Launches Devnet V2 with Parallel Execution Enhancements
summary: Monad Labs has officially upgraded its public devnet to V2, introducing improved parallelized EVM execution and optimized database access for developers.

title: EigenLayer Stage 4 Roadmap Unveiled
summary: EigenLayer unveils Stage 4 of its protocol, focusing on full permissionless AVS deployment and cross-AVS security orchestration.

title: Unizen Protocol Bug Bounty Payout: $250k
summary: Unizen awarded a $250,000 bounty to a security researcher who identified a potential logic flaw in its cross-chain swap engine, preventing a significant exploit.

title: Ethereum Pectra Upgrade Devnet-5 Launches
summary: The fifth devnet for the Ethereum Pectra upgrade is now live, introducing refined EIP-7702 implementation and account abstraction enhancements.

title: Solana ZK-Compression Mainnet Milestone
summary: Solana's ZK-Compression implementation achieves a major milestone, reducing on-chain state costs by up to 100x for large-scale token deployments.

title: Hyperliquid Bug Bounty Reward: $1M Payout
summary: Hyperliquid successfully awarded a $1,000,000 bug bounty to a security researcher who identified a critical vulnerability in the L1 settlement engine.

title: Lido V3 Upgrade Proposal
summary: The Lido community is reviewing a proposal for V3, which introduces a modular architecture for node operators and enhanced staking efficiency.

title: Arbitrum Stylus Mainnet Milestone
summary: Arbitrum Stylus reaches a major milestone on its path to mainnet, allowing developers to write smart contracts in Rust and C++ with EVM compatibility.

title: FlashBridge Protocol White-Hat Report
summary: A critical vulnerability in FlashBridge's cross-chain settlement logic was reported by a white-hat hacker, preventing a potential $2.5M exploit.

title: Hyperlane V3 Mainnet Expansion
summary: Hyperlane expands its permissionless interoperability layer to 5 new chains, introducing V3 hooks for custom security models and cross-chain governance.

title: EigenLayer AVS Security Framework Release
summary: EigenLayer releases a comprehensive security framework for Actively Validated Services (AVS), focusing on slashing conditions and operator decentralization.

title: Monad Devnet Milestone: 10k TPS Reached
summary: Monad's internal devnet achieves a stable 10,000 transactions per second in a distributed environment, validating its parallel EVM architecture.

title: UPCX Protocol Exploit: $70M Loss
summary: A major exploit targeting the UPCX protocol resulted in a $70M loss in April 2025. The attack involved a vulnerability in the protocol's liquidity management system.

title: USDN Synthetic Dollar Bug Bounty
summary: USDN has launched a new bug bounty program on Immunefi with rewards up to $50,000 for critical vulnerabilities in its synthetic asset logic.

title: KiloEx Vulnerability Incident: $7.5M
summary: KiloEx experienced a security incident resulting in $7.5M in lost funds. Security researchers identified an edge case in the platform's trading engine.

title: Loopscale Security Breach: $5.8M Loss
summary: Loopscale was targeted in a security breach that led to a $5.8M loss. The attack focused on a flaw in the cross-chain collateralization logic.

title: ZKsync Incident Analysis: $5.0M
summary: A ZKsync ecosystem project was exploited for $5.0M. The incident highlights the ongoing challenges in securing rollup-based infrastructure.

title: Term Labs Exploit: $1.5M Loss
summary: Term Labs suffered a $1.5M exploit due to a bug in its interest rate calculation module. The issue has since been patched by the team.

title: Ostium Protocol Bug Bounty Launch
summary: Ostium Protocol is offering up to $100,000 in bug bounties for findings related to its RWA perpetuals exchange on Arbitrum.

title: Sonic Chain Mainnet Launch
summary: Sonic Chain has officially launched its mainnet, claiming 10,000+ verifiable TPS and full EVM compatibility. It aims to power high-frequency DeFi apps.

title: Uniswap v4 Mainnet Launch Intel
summary: Uniswap v4 introduces 'hooks', allowing for customized liquidity pools and dynamic fees. The security of these hooks is now a primary focus for DeFi auditors.

title: Solana Firedancer v1.2 Performance Benchmark
summary: New benchmarks for Firedancer show significant improvements in block processing speed and network stability under extreme load conditions.

title: L2 Bridge Exploit Analysis: $45M Loss
summary: A complex exploit targeting a major L2 bridge protocol was identified. The attack used a flaw in the cross-chain message verification logic.

title: Immunefi 2025 Bug Bounty Report
summary: Immunefi reports a 30% increase in critical vulnerability findings in 2025, with major payouts reaching new highs for infrastructure-level exploits.

title: New ERC-4337 Account Abstraction Updates
summary: Recent updates to the Account Abstraction standard improve gas efficiency for user operations and simplify multi-chain wallet management.
